messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao AWS para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## SageMaker → OCI Data Science

### Mapeamento

| AWS | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| SageMaker | Data Science |
| Notebook Instances | Notebook Sessions |
| Training Jobs | Training Jobs |
| Endpoints | Model Deployment |

### OCI Data Science

- Jupyter notebooks
- ML training jobs
- Model deployment
- GPU instances

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_datascience_notebook_session" "notebook" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  project_id    = oci_datascience_project.project.id
  shape        = "VM.Standard2.4"
}
```

### Considerations

- Less pre-built algorithms
- Bring your own ML framework
- Integrated with OCI Functions
